user_input: I was charged twice this month.
basic: I'm sorry to hear that you've experienced a duplicate charge this month. To assist you further, could you please provide me with the date and amount of the charges that you are concerned about? Once I have that information, I will flag it for our billing team to investigate. Thank you for your patience!
refined:
I understand how concerning it is to see a duplicate charge on your account. To assist you further, could you please provide the charge date and amount for the duplicate charge?

I'll flag this for review by our billing team with the [DUPLICATE-CHARGE] tag. Rest assured, we will work to resolve this issue promptly.
cot:
I understand how concerning it can be to see duplicate charges on your account. I want to help resolve this for you.

According to our billing policy, duplicate charges are always refundable. To assist you further, could you please provide me with the date and amount of the charges in question? I will flag this for review by our billing team.

Thank you for your patience as we work to resolve this issue.

user_input: Why did I get a late fee when auto-pay is enabled?
basic:
Even though auto-pay is enabled, it does not guarantee that payments will be successful. Common reasons for a late fee despite having auto-pay include:

- Expired card
- Insufficient funds
- Address Verification Service (AVS) mismatch
- Bank decline

You should check if you received a payment failure email, as this will provide more details on why the payment did not go through. Additionally, it’s a good idea to verify your card details in your account settings to ensure everything is up to date.
refined:
I understand your concern regarding the late fee despite having auto-pay enabled. 

Auto-pay being enabled does not guarantee successful payment, as common issues such as an expired card, insufficient funds, or an address verification mismatch can lead to payment failures. If you received a payment failure email, that could provide more insight into the issue. 

Please verify your card details in your account settings. If you need further assistance, I'm raising a ticket for our billing team; expect a response within 1 business day. 

Thank you for your patience, and we're here to help you resolve this.
cot:
I understand your concern regarding the late fee despite having auto-pay enabled. 

According to our billing policy, having auto-pay enabled does not guarantee successful payment. Common reasons for a late fee in this situation include an expired card, insufficient funds, an address verification mismatch, or a bank decline. It's important to check if you received a payment failure email, as this can provide more insight into the issue.

I'll flag this for review by our billing team to investigate the specifics of your account and the late fee charged. Thank you for your patience, and I appreciate your understanding as we look into this matter.

user_input: I cancelled my subscription but still got billed.
basic: I understand how frustrating it can be to receive a charge after cancellation. To assist you better, could you please provide the date of your cancellation confirmation email? If your cancellation was confirmed before the billing date, it may be a billing error, and I can flag it for the billing team to investigate. If the cancellation was after the billing date, please note that cancellations are not retroactive, and the charge covers the current period already billed. Let me know how you'd like to proceed!
refined:
I understand your concern about being billed after canceling your subscription. This situation can be frustrating, and I'm here to help.

If your cancellation was confirmed before the billing date, this may indicate a billing error. I will need to flag this for our billing team to investigate further. Please provide me with the date of your cancellation confirmation email.

Rest assured, we will look into this matter promptly.
cot:
I understand your concern about being billed after canceling your subscription. According to our billing policy, if you were charged after your cancellation, it is often due to the cancellation being initiated after the billing date for that cycle, as cancellations are not retroactive.

To assist you further, could you please provide me with the date of your cancellation confirmation email? If your cancellation was confirmed before the billing date, this may be a billing error, and I will flag it for our billing team to investigate. 

Thank you for your patience, and I’m here to help resolve this issue for you.

basic: I completely understand how frustrating unexpected charges can be. I want to make this right. Can you tell me which charge is concerning you? This will help me assist you better.
refined:
I completely understand how frustrating unexpected charges can be. I want to make this right. Can you tell me which charge is concerning you? 

Once I have that information, I'll treat it as a billing dispute and follow the appropriate steps. 

Thank you for your patience as we work through this together.
cot: I completely understand how frustrating unexpected charges can be. I want to make this right. Can you tell me which charge is concerning you?

user_input: Can I get a refund for last month's payment?
basic:
To determine if you can receive a refund for last month's payment, we need to consider our refund eligibility criteria. 

For monthly plans, refunds are available within 7 calendar days of the charge date, provided that your account has not consumed more than 20% of the monthly API quota or storage allocation. 

If the 7-day window has passed or if you have used more than 20% of your quota, unfortunately, we cannot issue a refund for last month. 

If you believe you are within the eligibility criteria, please provide the date of the charge and your usage details, and I can assist you further.
refined:
I understand your concern regarding last month's payment and the possibility of a refund. According to our refund policy, refunds for monthly plans are available within 7 calendar days of the charge date, provided that the account has not consumed more than 20% of the monthly quota.

Since the eligibility window may have passed, I'll flag this for review by our billing team. They will assess your situation and get back to you. 

Thank you for your patience, and we appreciate your understanding as we look into this matter.
cot:
I understand that you're inquiring about a refund for last month's payment, and I can see how this situation can be concerning. 

According to our refund policy, refunds for monthly plans are available within 7 calendar days of the charge date, provided that the account has not consumed more than 20% of the monthly API quota or storage allocation. Since it appears that the eligibility window may have passed, I will need to flag this for review by our billing team to determine if any exceptions can be made.

Thank you for your patience as we look into this matter.
